AC-1.1.requirement: docs/iteration-layout.md이 세 필수 파일(brief.md, verify-report.md, decision-log.md)과 canonical 디렉터리 정규식을 문서화한다

verification.description: docs/iteration-layout.md documents three required filenames and canonical regex; no legacy sink or alt-filename bullets

AC-1.2-docs.requirement: canonical iteration-dir regex 리터럴이 docs/iteration-layout.md에 기록됨 (docs 측면; skill 측 강제는 INC-2/INC-4a에서 추가)

verification.description: canonical iteration-dir regex literal recorded in spec doc (docs-side only; skill-side enforcement pending)

AC-1.3.requirement: .iteration-*/가 기본값으로 .gitignore에 포함되고 옵트인 트래킹 절차가 문서화됨

verification.description: .iteration-*/ globally ignored by default; opt-in tracking procedure documented in layout doc

AC-1.4.requirement: 시크릿 스캔 가이던스가 문서에 명시됨 (도구 이름 + pre-commit 타이밍)

verification.description: secret-scan tool named and pre-commit timing recommended in layout doc

AC-2.1.requirement: /explore Phase 5가 .iteration-<N>/brief.md를 타겟 경로로 명시; 레거시 target/explore 경로 제거; 훅 로직 불변(SHA256 baseline)

verification.description: Phase 5 hands off to .iteration-<N>/brief.md; no legacy path; hook scripts byte-identical to baseline

AC-2.2.requirement: brief 템플릿 필수 4섹션(Bet/Appetite/Boundaries-Non-goals/Risk-flagged rabbit-holes) + 금지 섹션(Action Items/AC/Tasks/To-do) 명시적 enumerate

verification.description: brief template enforces exactly four canonical sections and explicitly forbids Action Items / AC / Tasks / To-do in a forbidden-section marker block

AC-2.4.requirement: brief.md 2,000 토큰 상한 + <!-- truncated --> 마커 규약

verification.description: brief.md 2000-token cap with <!-- truncated --> sentinel (word-count approximation per _shared/lib.sh)

AC-1.2-explore.requirement: /explore Phase 5 진입 시 디렉터리 이름이 canonical 정규식 위반하면 hard-error abort (silent skip / auto-correct / warn-and-continue 금지)

verification.description: explore SKILL Phase 5 enforces canonical regex ^\.iteration-[1-9][0-9]*$ with hard-error abort on violation

AC-2.3.requirement: IMP는 .iteration-<N>/{brief,verify-report,decision-log}.md 쓰기 시 tmp 파일 → atomic rename 프로토콜 사용

verification.description: IMP atomic write protocol: write to .tmp → atomic rename. Documented in agents/imp.md; cross-referenced from skills/execute/SKILL.md

AC-1.2-execute.requirement: /execute Phase 0 진입 시 이터레이션 디렉터리 이름이 canonical 정규식 위반하면 hard-error abort (silent skip / auto-correct / warn-and-continue 금지)

verification.description: execute SKILL Phase 0 enforces canonical regex ^\.iteration-[1-9][0-9]*$ with hard-error abort on violation

AC-3.1.requirement: /execute Phase 0a가 이터레이션 디렉터리 선택, 이름 검증(canonical regex), 0/1/N candidate 분기, hard-error abort 을 수행

verification.description: Phase 0a iteration selection: glob enumeration, canonical regex, single/multi/zero candidate branches, hard-error abort, Python regex oracle cross-check

AC-3.2.requirement: /execute Phase 0가 brief 로드, rabbit-holes 언급; agents/pln.md rabbit-hole 규칙 섹션, PLN-rabbit-hole constraint 결합

verification.description: brief rabbit-holes flow into PLN as constraints

AC-3.3a.requirement: /execute Phase 0가 <brief>...</brief> 래핑 + data-not-instructions directive + 모든 dispatch에 적용; skill 자체에 unguarded injection-seed 부재

verification.description: <brief> wrapping + data-not-instructions + universal scope + meta-guard for injection-seed phrases

AC-3.4.requirement: /execute Phase 0가 HARNESS_DISABLE_BRIEF 이스케이프 해치 문서화 + skip branch + log line + rationale

verification.description: HARNESS_DISABLE_BRIEF escape hatch with legacy-fallback rationale
Phase 3c checkpoint shape: 3 options, each ≥6 words, HARNESS_DISABLE_CHECKPOINT

AC-5.1b.requirement: 3c (a) 선택 시 ≥1 sentence freetext + .iteration-<N+1>/decision-log.md append + empty/Y-N 거부 + rubber-stamp rationale

verification.description: Freetext requirement + decision-log append + rejection of empty/Y-N

AC-5.2.requirement: Freetext가 .iteration-<N+1>/decision-log.md에 append되고 다음 /explore session이 inherit; Phase 3 report appendix에 기록

verification.description: Freetext persistence across iteration boundary + /explore inheritance + report appendix capture

AC-5.3.requirement: /execute Phase 3 HARNESS_DISABLE_CHECKPOINT 이스케이프 해치 + CI/automation rationale

verification.description: HARNESS_DISABLE_CHECKPOINT escape hatch with CI/automation rationale

AC-C.1.requirement: _shared/lib.sh의 md_section이 fence-aware: ``` 또는 ~~~ 코드블럭 내부의 ## 라인을 섹션 종결자로 취급하지 않음

verification.description: md_section helper fence-aware (backtick + tilde + info-string variants)

AC-C.2.requirement: _shared/lib.sh의 grep_forbidden_phrase가 declaration-context 키워드(must not/do not/forbidden/금지/never/shall not/등)로 guarded match suppress; EC=1 on unguarded, EC=0 on all-guarded

verification.description: grep_forbidden_phrase declaration-aware with known line-wide limitation locked by adversarial test
README word count ≤ 550

AC-6.2.requirement: README.md 내 하이프 렉시콘 12토큰의 whole-word 대소문자 무시 합계 ≤ 4

verification.description: README hype-word hits ≤ 4; word-boundary aware (excludes 'powerfully')

AC-6.3.requirement: Install/Use it/Usage 헤딩 또는 /plugin marketplace add / /plugin install를 포함하는 contiguous 블록이 ≤ 15줄

verification.description: Largest install-block span ≤ 15 lines; heading-bounded (terminates at next H2) or blank-line-bounded for slash-command runs

AC-6.4.requirement: README.md의 GFM 테이블 수 ≤ 1 (fenced code block 내부 제외, blockquote 라인은 테이블로 취급하지 않음)

verification.description: README GFM table count ≤ 1 (fence-aware; blockquote-pipe false positives excluded)

AC-6.5.requirement: 코드 펜스 외부에서 1인칭 대명사(I|we|our|my|us) 단어경계 매치 = 0

verification.description: First-person pronoun count in non-fenced README prose = 0 (fence-stripping validated)

AC-6.8.requirement: README.md가 .claude/hooks/*.py 등 비존재 훅 경로를 참조하지 않음; 참조된 skills/* 경로는 모두 실존

verification.description: No references to non-existent .claude/hooks/*.py paths; every skills/* path in README resolves on disk

AC-6.9.requirement: README.md가 `claude plugin install` 문자열을 포함하지 않음; install/marketplace 언급 시 `/plugin marketplace add` 또는 `/plugin install` 사용

verification.description: Install guidance uses in-session slash commands; no forbidden 'claude plugin install' CLI string

AC-6.10.requirement: README.md가 4개 원칙(self-confirmation avoidance / interview-on-ambiguity / pre-arranged verification / cross-session spec persistence) 키워드를 모두 포함하며 `(partial)` 또는 `\bpartial\b` 헤지 부재

verification.description: README covers all 4 principle keyword groups; no 'partial' hedge adjective

AC-6.11.requirement: README.md의 H2 수가 정확히 4일 때 본문 단어 수 stddev ≥ 25 (프로즈-매트릭스 방지 프록시). H2 ≠ 4면 trivial PASS. SKP deletion test는 PR 리뷰 체크리스트로 유지.

verification.description: Prose-matrix proxy: H2=4 ⇒ stddev ≥ 25; H2≠4 ⇒ trivial pass. Known false-pass surfaces documented in bundle README.

AC-6.6.requirement: .claude-plugin/marketplace.json field plugins[0].description does not contain 3-persona, 3-role, or self-affirmation; length ≤ 200 chars

verification.description: marketplace.json plugins[0].description has length ≤ 200 and contains none of the banned substrings (3-persona, 3-role, self-affirmation)

AC-6.7.requirement: .claude-plugin/plugin.json field description does not contain 3-persona, 3-role, or self-affirmation bias; shares ≥ 2 bigrams with marketplace.json description

verification.description: plugin.json description is substring-clean and shares ≥ 2 bigrams with marketplace.json description; bigram extractor is punctuation-robust

AC-A.1.requirement: Baseline variance experiment directory scaffold (README + manifest + corpus structure documented)

verification.description: Baseline-variance README enumerates corpus fixtures, documents ≥3 noise sources + mitigations; 3-level check happy/edge/adversarial

AC-A.2.requirement: Archived debate corpus selected (≥3 .md fixtures), manifested with real sha256 content hashes, provenance headers present

verification.description: inputs/manifest.json enumerates ≥3 fixtures with real sha256; adversarial test asserts content-dependent hashing and topic-diversity via distinct top keywords

AC-A.3.requirement: Measurement script (run.sh) generates per-input/iteration rows in results.jsonl with schema_version, stance_agreement_rate, round3_survival_rate, ts, provider, mode; supports HARNESS_BASELINE_MODE=mock|real switch

verification.description: run.sh appends schema-valid JSONL with [0,1]-invariant rate metrics; append-only across invocations; dry-run safe on adversarial corpus

AC-A.4.requirement: summary.md auto-regenerated from results.jsonl with mean, σ, 95% CI, sample count; includes rabbit-hole #6 caveat text about correlated provider failure detection scope

verification.description: summary.md derived deterministically from results.jsonl with mean/σ/95%CI/N for stance_agreement and round3_survival metrics; includes echo-chamber caveat
